'''ât-w-k''' ('''katawak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lick|lick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lick|lick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| katawak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawak|thitawak]] || [[word:jitawak|jitawak]] || [[word:shitawak|shitawak]] || [[word:kitawak|kitawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawak|thuthutawak]] || [[word:jujutawak|jujutawak]] || [[word:shushutawak|shushutawak]] || [[word:kukutawak|kukutawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawak|thutawak]] || [[word:jutawak|jutawak]] || [[word:shutawak|shutawak]] || [[word:kutawak|kutawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawak|thutawak]] || [[word:jutawak|jutawak]] || [[word:shutawak|shutawak]] || [[word:kutawak|kutawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawak|thetawak]] || [[word:jetawak|jetawak]] || [[word:shetawak|shetawak]] || [[word:ketawak|ketawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawak|thothotawak]] || [[word:jojotawak|jojotawak]] || [[word:shoshotawak|shoshotawak]] || [[word:kokotawak|kokotawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawak|thotawak]] || [[word:jotawak|jotawak]] || [[word:shotawak|shotawak]] || [[word:kotawak|kotawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawak|thotawak]] || [[word:jotawak|jotawak]] || [[word:shotawak|shotawak]] || [[word:kotawak|kotawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtawak|thĂŠtawak]] || [[word:jĂŠtawak|jĂŠtawak]] || [[word:shĂŠtawak|shĂŠtawak]] || [[word:kĂŠtawak|kĂŠtawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawak|thathatawak]] || [[word:jajatawak|jajatawak]] || [[word:shashatawak|shashatawak]] || [[word:kakatawak|kakatawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawak|thatawak]] || [[word:jatawak|jatawak]] || [[word:shatawak|shatawak]] || [[word:katawak|katawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawak|thatawak]] || [[word:jatawak|jatawak]] || [[word:shatawak|shatawak]] || [[word:katawak|katawak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatawak|shatawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatawak|goshatawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatawak|gokishatawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatawaknĂŒ|shatawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatawaknknĂŒ|goshatawaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawaknĂŒ|gokishatawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatawakshĂ«|shatawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatawaknkshĂ«|goshatawaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatawakshĂ«|gokishatawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawakro|shatawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawaknkro|goshatawaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawakro|gokishatawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawakmu|shatawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawaknkmu|goshatawaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawakmu|gokishatawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatawaksher|shatawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatawaknksher|goshatawaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatawaksher|gokishatawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatawakng|shatawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatawaknkng|goshatawaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatawakng|gokishatawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatawakya|shatawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatawaknkya|goshatawaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatawakya|gokishatawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatawakyam|shatawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatawaknkyam|goshatawaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatawakyam|gokishatawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawaknĂŒshĂ«|shatawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshatawaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishatawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawaknĂŒro|shatawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawaknknĂŒro|goshatawaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawaknĂŒro|gokishatawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawaknĂŒmu|shatawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawaknknĂŒmu|goshatawaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawaknĂŒmu|gokishatawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawakshĂ«nĂŒ|shatawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawakshĂ«ro|shatawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawaknkshĂ«ro|goshatawaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawakshĂ«ro|gokishatawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawakshĂ«mu|shatawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawaknkshĂ«mu|goshatawaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawakshĂ«mu|gokishatawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawakronĂŒ|shatawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawaknkronĂŒ|goshatawaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawakronĂŒ|gokishatawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawakroshĂ«|shatawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawaknkroshĂ«|goshatawaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawakroshĂ«|gokishatawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawakromu|shatawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawaknkromu|goshatawaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawakromu|gokishatawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawakmunĂŒ|shatawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawaknkmunĂŒ|goshatawaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawakmunĂŒ|gokishatawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawakmushĂ«|shatawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawaknkmushĂ«|goshatawaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawakmushĂ«|gokishatawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawakmuro|shatawakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawaknkmuro|goshatawaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawakmuro|gokishatawakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
